g.aria-label: From raw commits to a changelog
g.title: From raw commits to a changelog

g.aria-label: Point gitgist at a commit range; Claude writes the user-facing notes and drops the
g.title: Point gitgist at a commit range; Claude writes the user-facing notes and drops the

g.aria-label: noise. No API key вАФ it uses your signed-in claude CLI.
g.title: noise. No API key вАФ it uses your signed-in claude CLI.

g.aria-label: - Dropped support for Node 18 вАФ Node 20 is now the minimum required version.
g.title: - Dropped support for Node 18 вАФ Node 20 is now the minimum required version.

g.aria-label: - Added `--watch` to the CLI to regenerate release notes automatically on every new commit.
g.title: - Added `--watch` to the CLI to regenerate release notes automatically on every new commit.

g.aria-label: - Large diffs are now streamed instead of being buffered in memory, reducing memory use on big changes.
g.title: - Large diffs are now streamed instead of being buffered in memory, reducing memory use on big changes.

g.aria-label: - Expired authentication tokens are now rejected cleanly instead of failing with a 500 error.
g.title: - Expired authentication tokens are now rejected cleanly instead of failing with a 500 error.

g.aria-label: - Empty commit ranges are handled gracefully instead of crashing.
g.title: - Empty commit ranges are handled gracefully instead of crashing.

g.aria-label: - Cached the parsed config for roughly 3x faster startup.
g.title: - Cached the parsed config for roughly 3x faster startup.

g.aria-label: - Expanded the quickstart with a tag-to-`HEAD` example.
g.title: - Expanded the quickstart with a tag-to-`HEAD` example.
